RimLogging.Sinks.SinkDef.label: Verse Log
RimLogging.Sinks.SinkDef.description: Forwards entries to RimWorld's built-in Verse.Log.

RimLogging.Sinks.SinkDef.label: Rolling Text File
RimLogging.Sinks.SinkDef.description: Appends plain-text log entries to a rolling file in the log directory.

RimLogging.Sinks.SinkDef.label: Rolling JSON File
RimLogging.Sinks.SinkDef.description: Appends structured NDJSON log entries to a rolling file in the log directory.
